name: Olive Garden Capellini Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Yellow squash, sliced thin and halved
1 lb Fresh angel hair pasta, Cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Saute onions, carrots, and broccoli for 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, squash, and garlic and sauté for 2 more minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients, stir well and bring to a simmer.
5. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until veggies are tender and flavors are well-blended.
6. Serve over cooked pasta.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan over the top and serve.
